hero.title: ITICs Community.
hero.subtitle: Meet the coordination, faculty, clubs, students, and collaborators who drive the formation, projects, and academic life of ICT Engineering.

coordination.title: Program coordination.
coordination.subtitle: Area responsible for academic operations support, student follow-up, institutional activities, and ICT Engineering outreach.
coordination.name: Lic. Juan Cornejo Hernández
coordination.role: Head of Information and Communications Technology Engineering Division
coordination.body: Coordinates academic processes, program activities, institutional follow-up, and outreach with students, faculty, and administrative areas.

faculty.title: Faculty.
faculty.subtitle: Professors who support students' academic and technical formation in programming, networks, databases, mathematics, telecommunications, security, research, and management.

software.name: ITICs Faculty
software.line: Programming fundamentals, web development, applications, and software engineering methodologies.

networks.name: ITICs Faculty
networks.line: Connectivity infrastructure, computer networks, wireless technologies, and cybersecurity.

data.name: ITICs Faculty
data.line: Data modeling, information administration, technology projects, and academic strengthening.

faculty.updatingBody: Full faculty profiles will be added soon.

clubs.title: Clubs and technical spaces.
clubs.subtitle: Spaces to learn beyond the classroom, practice with real projects, collaborate with peers, and strengthen technical skills.

robotics.title: Robotics Club
robotics.description: Design, programming, control, and participation in robotics competitions like VEX Robotics.

iot.title: IoT Club
iot.description: Sensors, microcontrollers, connectivity, dashboards, automation, and smart systems.

developers.title: Developers Club
developers.description: Programming, GitHub, web development, applications, modern tools, and technical collaboration.

entrepreneurs.title: Entrepreneurship Workshop
entrepreneurs.description: Technology ideas, prototypes, business models, and impactful projects.

leadership.title: Student leadership.
leadership.subtitle: Students who drive projects, workshops, digital resources, and technical collaboration within the ITICs community.

jose.name: José Manuel Cortes Cerón
jose.role: Student collaborator · Software, AI, and IoT
jose.description: Supports project development, technical community, digital resources, complementary training activities, and web identity for ITICs.

leadership.growingBody: More student leader and academic collaborator profiles will be added soon.

credits.title: Site credits.
credits.body: This site was developed as an initiative to strengthen the digital identity of ICT Engineering at ITSOEH, share its academic formation, projects, community, and admission process.
credits.aboutCta: View About page and full credits

cta.title: Be part of a community that learns by building.
cta.subtitle: Discover clubs, projects, faculty, and collaboration spaces that strengthen your formation inside and outside the classroom.

profile.name: José Manuel Cortes Cerón
profile.role: Student collaborator · Software, AI, and IoT
profile.bio1: Information and Communications Technology Engineering student focused on software development, artificial intelligence, IoT systems, and digital solution architecture. Has collaborated on academic and technology projects aimed at building platforms, automation, interactive systems, and digital resources for the ITICs community.
profile.bio2: Within the community, supports project development, technical documentation, web resources, complementary training activities, and strengthening the digital identity of the program.
profile.degreeInstitution: Instituto Tecnológico Superior del Occidente del Estado de Hidalgo
profile.communityDesc: Participation in digital resources, documentation, technical activities, and strengthening the institutional web presence.
profile.relatedDesc: Academic and technical initiatives linked to software, interactive experiences, and community collaboration.
